Write function to round 0.5 and 1.5 up consistently.

```{r}
#| warning: false

# function to round correctly

round2 = function(x, digits) {
  posneg = sign(x)
  z = abs(x)*10^digits
  z = z + 0.5 + sqrt(.Machine$double.eps)
  z = trunc(z)
  z = z/10^digits
  z*posneg
}

```


Unibe colors.
From R package [https://github.com/dcr-unibe-ch/unibecols](https://github.com/dcr-unibe-ch/unibecols)

```{r}

unibeRed <- function() "#e4003c"

unibeRed50 <- function() "#f39b95"

unibeRedS <- function() c(unibeRed(), unibeRed50())


unibeBlack <- function() "#000000"

unibeBlackS <- function() c(unibeBlack(), "#575756", "#878787", "#b3b2b2", "#dadada", "#ededed")

unibeGrey <- function() "#7a7c81"


unibeIce <- function() "#466553"

unibeIceS <- function() c(unibeIce(), "#668271", "#8aa092", "#afbfb5", "#d6ded9")


unibeSaphire <- function() "#007ea2"

unibeSaphireS <- function() c(unibeSaphire(), "#5294b4", "#85adc6", "#b0c7d9", "#d8e2ec")


unibeOcean <- function() "#203a5d"

unibeOceanS <- function() c(unibeOcean(), "#4a5575", "#757792", "#a1a0b4", "#d0ced9")


unibeViolet <- function() "#8a1e22"

unibeVioletS <- function() c(unibeViolet(), "#a14540", "#b86f65", "#d19d93", "#e8cdc6")


unibeBrown <- function() "#5a3217"

unibeBrownS <- function() c(unibeBrown(), "#754e31", "#927157", "#b49b87", "#d7cac0")


unibeMint <- function() "#36b5b6"

unibeMintS <- function() c(unibeMint(), "#75c4c5", "#a0d3d4", "#c4e3e3", "#e2f1f2")


unibePastel <- function() "#ec627d"

unibePastelS <- function() c(unibePastel(), "#f08797", "#f4a9b1", "#f8c8cc", "#fce4e7")


unibeIce <- function() "#4767af"

unibeIceS <- function() c(unibeIce(), "#6e82c0", "#949fd1", "#b9bee1", "#dcdef1")


unibeMustard <- function() "#c2b600"

unibeMustardS <- function() c(unibeMustard(), "#cfc43c", "#dcd274", "#e8e1a4", "#f4f0d3")


unibeApricot <- function() "#ee7402"

unibeApricotS <- function() c(unibeApricot(), "#f3923e", "#f7af70", "#fbcba1", "#fde6d1")


unibePalettes <- function(plot = TRUE){
  x <- palette <- NULL

  cols <- c("unibeRedS", "unibeBlackS", "unibeIceS", "unibeSaphireS", "unibeOceanS",
    "unibeVioletS", "unibeBrownS", "unibeMintS", "unibePastelS", "unibeIceS",
    "unibeMustardS", "unibeApricotS")

  dat <- do.call(rbind, lapply(cols,
    function(name){
      fn <- get(name)
      # print(name)
      values <- fn()
      data.frame(palette = name,
                 x = 1:length(values),
                 cols = values)
    }))

  dat$palette <- factor(dat$palette, cols)

  if(plot){

    pals <- dat
    pals$x2 <- pals$x + 1
    pals$y <- as.numeric(factor(pals$palette, rev(unique(pals$palette)))) - .5
    pals$y2 <- as.numeric(factor(pals$palette, rev(unique(pals$palette)))) + .5

    oldpar <- par(mai = c(.5, 1.5, .5, .5))
    on.exit(par(oldpar))

    plot(1,1,type = "n",
         xlim = c(min(pals$x, pals$x2), max(pals$x, pals$x2)),
         ylim = c(min(pals$y, pals$y2), max(pals$y, pals$y2)),
         xaxt = "n", yaxt = "n", xlab = "", ylab = "", bty = "n")
    with(pals, rect(x, y, x2, y2, col = cols, border = NA))
    axis(at = as.numeric(unique(factor(pals$palette, rev(unique(pals$palette))))),
         labels = unique(factor(pals$palette, rev(unique(pals$palette)))),
         side = 2, las = 2)
    axis(side = 1, at = unique(pals$x) + .5, labels = unique(pals$x))

  } else {
    dat
  }

}


unibeScales <- function() c("unibeRedS", "unibeBlackS", "unibeIceS", "unibeSaphireS", "unibeOceanS",
                            "unibeVioletS", "unibeBrownS", "unibeMintS", "unibePastelS", "unibeIceS",
                            "unibeMustardS", "unibeApricotS")

```




# Data preparation
## Import data

```{r}
#| warning: false
#| output: false

# import SwissPedGrowth data
load(file = here("data", "raw", "SwissPedGrowth_included", "data_participant.RData"))
data_participant <- data_participant_included
load(here("data", "raw", "SwissPedGrowth_included", "data_diagnoses.RData"))
data_diagnoses <- data_diagnoses_included
load(here("data", "raw", "SwissPedGrowth_included", "data_height_clean.RData"))
data_height_clean <- data_height_clean_included
load(here("data", "raw", "SwissPedGrowth_included", "data_weight_clean.RData"))
data_weight_clean <- data_weight_clean_included
load(here("data", "raw", "SwissPedGrowth_included", "data_bmi.RData"))
data_bmi <- data_bmi_included
load(here("data", "raw", "SwissPedGrowth_included", "data_head.RData"))
data_head <- data_head_included

rm(data_participant_included, data_diagnoses_included, data_height_clean_included, data_weight_clean_included, data_bmi_included, data_head_included)

# import interpolated LMS-values from braegger
interpolated_braegger_height <- read_csv(here("data","raw","Interpolated-growth-references","interpolated_braegger_height.csv"))
interpolated_braegger_weight <- read_csv(here("data","raw","Interpolated-growth-references","interpolated_braegger_weight.csv"))
interpolated_braegger_bmi <- read_csv(here("data","raw","Interpolated-growth-references","interpolated_braegger_bmi.csv"))
interpolated_braegger_head_circumference <- read.csv(here("data", "raw", "Interpolated-growth-references", "interpolated_braegger_head_circumference.csv"))
braegger_length <- read_csv(here("data","raw","Interpolated-growth-references","braegger_length.csv"))

# import interpolated LMS-values from eiholzer
interpolated_eiholzer_height <- read_csv(here("data","raw","Interpolated-growth-references","interpolated_eiholzer_height_25.csv"))
interpolated_eiholzer_weight <- read_csv(here("data","raw","Interpolated-growth-references","interpolated_eiholzer_weight_25.csv"))
interpolated_eiholzer_bmi <- read_csv(here("data","raw","Interpolated-growth-references","interpolated_eiholzer_bmi_25.csv"))

# import interpolated LMS-values from prader
interpolated_prader_height <- read_csv(here("data","raw","Interpolated-growth-references","interpolated_prader_height.csv"))
interpolated_prader_weight <- read_csv(here("data","raw","Interpolated-growth-references","interpolated_prader_weight.csv"))
interpolated_prader_head_circumference <- read.csv(here("data", "raw", "Interpolated-growth-references", "interpolated_prader_head_circumference.csv"))
interpolated_prader_length <- read_csv(here("data","raw","Interpolated-growth-references","interpolated_prader_length.csv"))

# import interpolated LMS-values from sempe
interpolated_sempe_height <- read_csv(here("data","raw","Interpolated-growth-references","interpolated_sempe_height.csv"))
interpolated_sempe_weight <- read_csv(here("data","raw","Interpolated-growth-references","interpolated_sempe_weight.csv"))
interpolated_sempe_head_circumference <- read.csv(here("data", "raw", "Interpolated-growth-references", "interpolated_sempe_hc.csv"))
interpolated_sempe_length <- read_csv(here("data","raw","Interpolated-growth-references","interpolated_sempe_length.csv"))


# import interpolated LMS-values from IOTF
interpolated_iotf_bmi <- read_csv(here("data","raw","Interpolated-growth-references","interpolated_iotf_bmi.csv"))


# genpop

data_general_population <- read_csv(here("data","raw","general_population.csv"))
data_general_population_bmi <- read_csv(here("data","raw","general_population_bmi.csv"))

```



## Inclusion criteria

Inclusion criteria of SwissPedGrowth (already applied)

Inclusion criteria for this analysis:
•	Children who had a plausible height, weight, BMI or head circumference measurement between 0 to 18 years.

Exclude:
•	AND excluded implausible height, weight, BMI or head circumference measurements.
•	AND excluded children with missing information on age or sex


```{r}
cat("Number participants in SwissPedGrowth\n")
data_participant |> nrow()

cat("Number of measurements in SwissPedGrowth")
data_height_clean |> nrow()
data_weight_clean |> nrow()
data_bmi |> nrow()
data_head |> nrow()


```
Excluded participants


```{r}

data_height_clean <- data_height_clean |> 
  mutate(include_analysis = case_when(is.na(age_years_height) ~ "No age at height",
                                      (age_years_height >= 18) ~ "Height after 18",
                                      combined_result == "Missing - Recording" | combined_result == "Missing - Sex" | combined_result == "Missing - Age" ~ "Invalid information",
                                      combined_result == "Exclude - Longitudinal-Outlier" | combined_result == "Exclude - Single-Outlier" | combined_result == "Exclude - Z-Score" ~ "Outlier",
                                      combined_result == "Carried-Forward" | combined_result == "Same-Day" ~ "Duplicate",
                                      TRUE ~ "Include")) |> 
  mutate(include_analysis = factor(include_analysis,
                                   levels = c("Include", "No age at height", "Height after 18", "Duplicate", "Outlier", "Invalid information")))

data_height_clean |> select(include_analysis) |>  tbl_summary()


data_weight_clean <- data_weight_clean |> 
  mutate(include_analysis = case_when(is.na(age_years_weight) ~ "No age at weight",
                                      (age_years_weight >= 18) ~ "weight after 18",
                                      combined_result == "Missing - Recording" | combined_result == "Missing - Sex" | combined_result == "Missing - Age" ~ "Invalid information",
                                      combined_result == "Exclude - Longitudinal-Outlier" | combined_result == "Exclude - Single-Outlier" | combined_result == "Exclude - Z-Score" ~ "Outlier",
                                      combined_result == "Carried-Forward" | combined_result == "Same-Day" ~ "Duplicate",
                                      TRUE ~ "Include")) |> 
  mutate(include_analysis = factor(include_analysis,
                                   levels = c("Include", "No age at weight", "weight after 18", "Duplicate", "Outlier", "Invalid information")))

data_weight_clean |> select(include_analysis) |>  tbl_summary()

data_head <- data_head |> 
  mutate(include_analysis = case_when(is.na(age_days_circumference) ~ "No age at head",
                                      (age_years_circumference < 0.08) | (age_years_circumference >= 18) ~ "head before 0.08 or after 18",
                                      manual_result == "Zero-or-negative-circumference" | manual_result == "Negative-age" ~ "Invalid information",
                                      manual_result == "Exclude - Z-Score" ~ "Outlier",
                                      manual_result == "Carried-Forward" | manual_result == "Same-Day" ~ "Duplicate",
                                      TRUE ~ "Include")) |> 
  mutate(include_analysis = factor(include_analysis,
                                   levels = c("Include", "No age at head", "head before 0.08 or after 18", "Duplicate", "Outlier", "Invalid information")))

data_head |> select(include_analysis) |>  tbl_summary()


data_bmi <- data_bmi |> 
  mutate(include_analysis = case_when(is.na(age_days_bmi) ~ "No age at bmi",
                                      (age_years_bmi < 2) | (age_years_bmi >= 18) ~ "bmi before 2 or after 18",
                                      combined_result_bmi == "Missing Weight - Recording" | combined_result_bmi == "Missing Weight - Sex" | combined_result_bmi == "Missing Weight - Age" ~ "Invalid information",
                                      combined_result_bmi == "Missing Height - Recording" | combined_result_bmi == "Missing Height - Sex" | combined_result_bmi == "Missing Height - Age" ~ "Invalid information",
                                      combined_result_bmi == "Exclude Weight - Longitudinal-Outlier" | combined_result_bmi == "Exclude Weight - Single-Outlier" | combined_result_weight == "Exclude Weight - Z-Score" ~ "Outlier",
                                      combined_result_bmi == "Exclude Height - Longitudinal-Outlier" | combined_result_bmi == "Exclude Height - Single-Outlier" | combined_result_bmi == "Exclude Height - Z-Score" ~ "Outlier",
                                      combined_result_bmi == "Exclude BMI - Z-Score" ~ "Outlier",
                                      combined_result_bmi == "Duplicate Weight - Carried-Forward" | combined_result_bmi == "Duplicate Weight - Same-Day" ~ "Duplicate",
                                      combined_result_bmi == "Duplicate Height - Carried-Forward" | combined_result_bmi == "Duplicate Height - Same-Day" ~ "Duplicate",
                                      TRUE ~ "Include")) |> 
  mutate(include_analysis = factor(include_analysis,
                                   levels = c("Include", "No age at bmi", "bmi before 2 or after 18", "Duplicate", "Outlier", "Invalid information")))

data_bmi |> select(include_analysis) |>  tbl_summary()


data_height_clean <- data_height_clean |> 
  filter(include_analysis == "Include")

data_weight_clean <- data_weight_clean |> 
  filter(include_analysis == "Include")

data_bmi <- data_bmi |> 
  filter(include_analysis == "Include")

data_head <- data_head |> 
  filter(include_analysis == "Include")

```


```{r}

data_participant <- data_participant |> 
  left_join(data_height_clean |>
              count(participant_id) |> rename("number_height_measurements" = "n"),
            by = "participant_id") |>
  left_join(data_weight_clean |>
              count(participant_id) |> rename("number_weight_measurements" = "n"),
            by = "participant_id") |> 
  left_join(data_bmi |>
              count(participant_id) |> rename("number_bmi_measurements" = "n"),
            by = "participant_id") |> 
  left_join(data_head |>
              count(participant_id) |> rename("number_head_measurements" = "n"),
            by = "participant_id") |> 
  mutate(height_measurement = case_when(number_height_measurements >= 1 ~ "yes",
                                        is.na(number_height_measurements) ~ "no"),
         weight_measurement = case_when(number_weight_measurements >= 1 ~ "yes",
                                        is.na(number_weight_measurements) ~ "no"),
         head_measurement = case_when(number_head_measurements >= 1 ~ "yes",
                                        is.na(number_head_measurements) ~ "no"),
         bmi_measurement = case_when(number_bmi_measurements >= 1 ~ "yes",
                                        is.na(number_bmi_measurements) ~ "no"),)

data_participant <- data_participant |> 
  mutate(include_analysis = case_when(is.na(sex) ~ "Exclude - no sex",
                                      is.na(birth_date) ~ "Exclude - no birth date",
                                      height_measurement == "no" & weight_measurement == "no" & head_measurement == "no" & bmi_measurement == "no" ~ "Exclude - no anthropometric",
                                      number_height_measurements >= 1 | number_weight_measurements >= 1 | number_head_measurements >= 1 | number_bmi_measurements >= 1 ~ "Include"))

data_participant |> 
  select(include_analysis, height_measurement, weight_measurement, head_measurement, bmi_measurement) |> 
  tbl_summary()


```




## Coding variables

### Nationality

```{r}

data_participant <- data_participant |> 
  mutate(nationality_group = case_when(nationality == "Switzerland" ~ "Swiss",
                                       continent_nationality == "Europe" ~ subcontinent_nationality,
                                       TRUE ~ continent_nationality),
         nationality_group_middle = factor(case_when(nationality == "Switzerland" ~ "Swiss",
                                                     nationality == "Turkey" ~ "Southern/Eastern Europe",
                                              subcontinent_nationality == "Northern Europe" | subcontinent_nationality == "Western Europe" ~ "Northern/Western Europe",
                                              subcontinent_nationality == "Southern Europe" | subcontinent_nationality == "Eastern Europe" ~ "Southern/Eastern Europe",
                                              is.na(nationality) ~ NA,
                                              TRUE ~ "Other"),
                                           levels = c("Swiss", "Northern/Western Europe", "Southern/Eastern Europe", "Other")),
         nationality_group_short = case_when(nationality == "Switzerland" ~ "Swiss",
                                             continent_nationality == "Europe" ~ "European",
                                             is.na(continent_nationality)==FALSE ~ "Non-European",
                                             TRUE ~ NA))

data_participant |> select(nationality_group, nationality_group_middle, nationality_group_short) |> tbl_summary()

data_height_clean <- data_height_clean |> 
  left_join(data_participant |> select(participant_id, nationality_group, nationality_group_middle, nationality_group_short), by = "participant_id")

data_weight_clean <- data_weight_clean |> 
  left_join(data_participant |> select(participant_id, nationality_group, nationality_group_middle, nationality_group_short), by = "participant_id")

data_head <- data_head |> 
  left_join(data_participant |> select(participant_id, nationality_group, nationality_group_middle, nationality_group_short), by = "participant_id")

data_bmi <- data_bmi |> 
  left_join(data_participant |> select(participant_id, nationality_group, nationality_group_middle, nationality_group_short), by = "participant_id")

```


### Swiss-SEP

```{r}

data_participant <- data_participant |> 
  mutate(swiss_sep_3_decile = factor(case_when(swiss_sep_3 < 50.09 ~ "1",
                                             swiss_sep_3 < 54.74 ~ "2",
                                             swiss_sep_3 < 58.06 ~ "3",
                                             swiss_sep_3 < 60.90 ~ "4",
                                             swiss_sep_3 < 63.56 ~ "5",
                                             swiss_sep_3 < 66.28 ~ "6",
                                             swiss_sep_3 < 69.21 ~ "7",
                                             swiss_sep_3 < 72.65 ~ "8",
                                             swiss_sep_3 < 77.18 ~ "9",
                                             swiss_sep_3 >= 77.18 ~ "10")),
         swiss_sep_3_quintile = factor(case_when(swiss_sep_3_decile == "1" | swiss_sep_3_decile == "2" ~ "1",
                                                 swiss_sep_3_decile == "3" | swiss_sep_3_decile == "4" ~ "2",
                                                 swiss_sep_3_decile == "5" | swiss_sep_3_decile == "6" ~ "3",
                                                 swiss_sep_3_decile == "7" | swiss_sep_3_decile == "8" ~ "4",
                                                 swiss_sep_3_decile == "9" | swiss_sep_3_decile == "10" ~ "5")))

data_height_clean <- data_height_clean |> 
  left_join(data_participant |> select(participant_id, swiss_sep_3, swiss_sep_3_decile, swiss_sep_3_quintile), by = "participant_id")

data_weight_clean <- data_weight_clean |> 
  left_join(data_participant |> select(participant_id, swiss_sep_3, swiss_sep_3_decile, swiss_sep_3_quintile), by = "participant_id")

data_head <- data_head |> 
  left_join(data_participant |> select(participant_id, swiss_sep_3, swiss_sep_3_decile, swiss_sep_3_quintile), by = "participant_id")
            
data_bmi <- data_bmi |> 
  left_join(data_participant |> select(participant_id, swiss_sep_3, swiss_sep_3_decile, swiss_sep_3_quintile), by = "participant_id")

```


### Age group


```{r}


data_height_clean <- data_height_clean |> 
  mutate(age_group_height = case_when(age_years_height < 1 ~ "Infancy: <1",
                               age_years_height < 6 ~ "Preschool age: 1–5",
                               age_years_height < 12 ~ "School age: 6–11",
                               age_years_height >= 12 ~ "Adolescence: 12–17")) |> 
  mutate(age_group_height = factor(age_group_height, levels = c("Infancy: <1", "Preschool age: 1–5", "School age: 6–11", "Adolescence: 12–17")))


data_weight_clean <- data_weight_clean |> 
  mutate(age_group_weight = case_when(age_years_weight < 1 ~ "Infancy: <1",
                               age_years_weight < 6 ~ "Preschool age: 1–5",
                               age_years_weight < 12 ~ "School age: 6–11",
                               age_years_weight >= 12 ~ "Adolescence: 12–17")) |> 
  mutate(age_group_weight = factor(age_group_weight, levels = c("Infancy: <1", "Preschool age: 1–5", "School age: 6–11", "Adolescence: 12–17")))


data_head <- data_head |> 
  mutate(age_group_head = case_when(age_years_circumference < 1 ~ "Infancy: <1",
                               age_years_circumference < 6 ~ "Preschool age: 1–5",
                               age_years_circumference < 12 ~ "School age: 6–11",
                               age_years_circumference >= 12 ~ "Adolescence: 12–17")) |> 
  mutate(age_group_head = factor(age_group_head, levels = c("Infancy: <1", "Preschool age: 1–5", "School age: 6–11", "Adolescence: 12–17")))



data_bmi <- data_bmi |> 
  mutate(age_group_bmi = case_when(age_years_bmi < 6 ~ "Preschool age: 2–5",
                               age_years_bmi < 12 ~ "School age: 6–11",
                               age_years_bmi >= 12 ~ "Adolescence: 12–17")) |> 
  mutate(age_group_bmi = factor(age_group_bmi, levels = c("Preschool age: 2–5", "School age: 6–11", "Adolescence: 12–17")))


```



### Gestational age

```{r}

data_height_clean <- data_height_clean |> 
  left_join(data_participant |> select(participant_id, gestational_age_weeks), by = "participant_id")

data_weight_clean <- data_weight_clean |> 
  left_join(data_participant |> select(participant_id, gestational_age_weeks), by = "participant_id")

data_head<- data_head |> 
  left_join(data_participant |> select(participant_id, gestational_age_weeks), by = "participant_id")

data_bmi <- data_bmi |> 
  left_join(data_participant |> select(participant_id, gestational_age_weeks), by = "participant_id")

```


correct age at measurement

```{r}

data_height_clean <- data_height_clean |> 
  mutate(age_days_GA_height = age_days_height + 7*(gestational_age_weeks - 40))

data_weight_clean <- data_weight_clean |> 
  mutate(age_days_GA_weight = age_days_weight + 7*(gestational_age_weeks - 40))

data_head<- data_head |> 
  mutate(age_days_GA_circumference = age_days_circumference + 7*(gestational_age_weeks - 40))

data_bmi <- data_bmi |> 
  mutate(age_days_GA_bmi = age_days_bmi + 7*(gestational_age_weeks - 40))

```


### Diagnoses affecting growth

Define excluded diagnoses affecting BMI

```{r}

icd_excluded_weight_temporarily <- c(
  ## Intestinal infections
  "A00", "A01", "A02", "A03", "A04", "A05", "A06", "A07", "A08", "A09",
  
  ## Certain zoonotic bacterial diseases
  "A20", "A21", "A22", "A23", "A24", "A25", "A26", "A27", "A28",
  
  ## Other bacterial diseases
  "A30", "A31", "A32", "A33", "A34", "A35", "A36", "A37", "A38", "A39", "A40", "A41", "A42", "A43", "A44", "A45", "A46", "A47", "A48", "A49",
  
  ## Rickettsioses
  "A75", "A76", "A77", "A78", "A79",
  
  ## Viral infections of the central nervous system
  "A80", "A81", "A82",   "A83", "A84", "A85", "A86", "A87", "A88", "A89",
    
  ## Arthropod-borne viral fevers and viral haemorrhagic fevers
  "A92", "A93", "A94", "A95", "A96", "A97", "A98", "A99",

  ## Viral hepatitis
  "B15", "B16", "B17", "B18", "B19",
  
  ## Systematic mycoses
  "B37", "B38", "B39",
  "B40", "B41", "B42", "B43", "B44", "B45", "B46",
  
  ## Protozoal diseases
```

Group diagnoses

```{r}

data_diagnoses <- data_diagnoses |> 
  mutate(diagnosis_affecting_growth = factor(case_when(is.na(diagnosis_icd10_code) & is.na(diagnosis_orpha_code_associated_icd) ~ "Unkown code",
                                         grepl(paste(icd_excluded_whole_study_period, collapse = "|"), diagnosis_icd10_code) | grepl(paste(icd_excluded_whole_study_period, collapse = "|"), diagnosis_orpha_code_associated_icd) ~ "Affecting growth whole study period",
                                         grepl(paste(icd_excluded_first_18_months, collapse = "|"), diagnosis_icd10_code) | grepl(paste(icd_excluded_first_18_months, collapse = "|"), diagnosis_orpha_code_associated_icd) ~ "Affecting growth first 18 months of life",
                                         grepl(paste(icd_excluded_permanently_after_diagnosis, collapse = "|"), diagnosis_icd10_code) | grepl(paste(icd_excluded_permanently_after_diagnosis, collapse = "|"), diagnosis_orpha_code_associated_icd) ~ "Affecting growth permanently after diagnosis",
                                         grepl(paste(icd_excluded_height_weight_after_diagnosis, collapse = "|"), diagnosis_icd10_code) | grepl(paste(icd_excluded_height_weight_after_diagnosis, collapse = "|"), diagnosis_orpha_code_associated_icd) ~ "Affecting height, weight, BMI permanently after diagnosis",
                                         grepl(paste(icd_excluded_height_after_diagnosis, collapse = "|"), diagnosis_icd10_code) | grepl(paste(icd_excluded_height_after_diagnosis, collapse = "|"), diagnosis_orpha_code_associated_icd) ~ "Affecting height permanently after diagnosis",
                                         grepl(paste(icd_excluded_weight_temporarily, collapse = "|"), diagnosis_icd10_code) | grepl(paste(icd_excluded_weight_temporarily, collapse = "|"), diagnosis_orpha_code_associated_icd) ~ "Affecting weight, BMI temporarily 4 weeks before and after",
                                         TRUE ~ "Include"),
                                      levels = c("Include", "Affecting growth whole study period", "Affecting growth first 18 months of life", "Affecting growth permanently after diagnosis", "Affecting height, weight, BMI permanently after diagnosis", "Affecting height permanently after diagnosis", "Affecting weight, BMI temporarily 4 weeks before and after", "Unkown code")))


data_diagnoses |> select(diagnosis_affecting_growth) |> 
  tbl_summary()

```

Add diagnoses details

```{r}
data_height_clean <- data_height_clean |> 
  left_join(data_diagnoses |> filter(diagnosis_affecting_growth != "Unkown code") |> select(participant_id, diagnosis_affecting_growth, age_days_diagnosis), by = "participant_id") |> 
  mutate(height_include_diagnosis =factor(case_when(diagnosis_affecting_growth == "Affecting growth whole study period" ~ "Exclude - whole study period",
                                                    age_years_height < 1.5 & diagnosis_affecting_growth == "Affecting growth first 18 months of life" ~ "Exclude - first 18 months",
                                                    (age_days_height - age_days_diagnosis) >= (-28) & diagnosis_affecting_growth == "Affecting growth permanently after diagnosis" ~ "Exclude - permanently after diagnosis",
                                                    (age_days_height - age_days_diagnosis) >= (-28) & diagnosis_affecting_growth == "Affecting height, weight, BMI permanently after diagnosis" ~ "Exclude - permanently after diagnosis",
                                                    (age_days_height - age_days_diagnosis) >= (-28) & diagnosis_affecting_growth == "Affecting height permanently after diagnosis" ~ "Exclude - permanently after diagnosis",
                                                    abs(age_days_height - age_days_diagnosis) <= (28) & diagnosis_affecting_growth == "Include" ~ "Include",
                                                     TRUE ~ NA),
         levels = c("Exclude - whole study period", "Exclude - first 18 months", "Exclude - permanently after diagnosis", "Include"))) |> 
  group_by(height_id) |> 
  arrange(height_include_diagnosis) |> 
  slice(1) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  select(-c(diagnosis_affecting_growth))

data_height_clean |> select(height_include_diagnosis) |> tbl_summary()


data_height_clean |> filter(height_include_diagnosis == "Include") |> distinct(height_id) |> nrow()

```


```{r}

data_weight_clean <- data_weight_clean |> 
  left_join(data_diagnoses |> filter(diagnosis_affecting_growth != "Unkown code") |> select(participant_id, diagnosis_affecting_growth, age_days_diagnosis), by = "participant_id") |> 
  mutate(weight_include_diagnosis =factor(case_when(diagnosis_affecting_growth == "Affecting growth whole study period" ~ "Exclude - whole study period",
                                                    age_years_weight < 1.5 & diagnosis_affecting_growth == "Affecting growth first 18 months of life" ~ "Exclude - first 18 months",
                                                    (age_days_weight - age_days_diagnosis) >= (-28) & diagnosis_affecting_growth == "Affecting growth permanently after diagnosis" ~ "Exclude - permanently after diagnosis",
                                                    (age_days_weight - age_days_diagnosis) >= (-28) & diagnosis_affecting_growth == "Affecting height, weight, BMI permanently after diagnosis" ~ "Exclude - permanently after diagnosis",
                                                    abs(age_days_weight - age_days_diagnosis) <= (28) & diagnosis_affecting_growth == "Affecting weight, BMI temporarily 4 weeks before and after" ~ "Exclude - 4 weeks before and after diagnosis",
                                                    abs(age_days_weight - age_days_diagnosis) <= (28) & diagnosis_affecting_growth == "Include" ~ "Include",
                                                     TRUE ~ NA),
         levels = c("Exclude - whole study period", "Exclude - first 18 months", "Exclude - permanently after diagnosis", "Exclude - 4 weeks before and after diagnosis", "Include"))) |> 
  group_by(weight_id) |> 
  arrange(weight_include_diagnosis) |> 
  slice(1) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  select(-c(diagnosis_affecting_growth))

data_weight_clean |> select(weight_include_diagnosis) |> tbl_summary()

data_weight_clean |> filter(weight_include_diagnosis == "Include") |> distinct(participant_id) |> nrow()

```

```{r}
  mutate(head_include_diagnosis =factor(case_when(diagnosis_affecting_growth == "Affecting growth whole study period" ~ "Exclude - whole study period",
```

```{r}
                                                    abs(age_days_bmi - age_days_diagnosis) <= (28) & diagnosis_affecting_growth == "Affecting weight, BMI temporarily 4 weeks before and after" ~ "Exclude - 4 weeks before and after diagnosis",
                                                    abs(age_days_bmi - age_days_diagnosis) <= (28) & diagnosis_affecting_growth == "Include" ~ "Include",
                                                     TRUE ~ NA),
```

### Number anthropometric measurements

#### Number of height measurements

```{r}

data_participant <- data_participant |> 
  left_join(data_height_clean |>
              count(participant_id) |> rename("number_height_measurements_total" = "n"),
            by = "participant_id") |> 
  mutate(height_measurement_total = case_when(number_height_measurements_total == 1 ~ "One",
                                           number_height_measurements_total == 2 ~ "Two",
                                           number_height_measurements_total >2 ~ "Three or more")) |> 
  left_join(data_height_clean |>
              filter(age_group_height == "Infancy: <1") |> 
              count(participant_id) |> rename("number_height_measurements_infancy" = "n"),
            by = "participant_id") |> 
  mutate(height_measurement_infancy = case_when(number_height_measurements_infancy >= 1 ~ "yes",
                                        is.na(number_height_measurements_infancy) ~ "no")) |> 
  left_join(data_height_clean |>
              filter(age_group_height == "Preschool age: 1–5") |> 
              count(participant_id) |> rename("number_height_measurements_preschool" = "n"),
            by = "participant_id") |> 
  mutate(height_measurement_preschool = case_when(number_height_measurements_preschool >= 1 ~ "yes",
                                        is.na(number_height_measurements_preschool) ~ "no")) |> 
  left_join(data_height_clean |>
              filter(age_group_height == "School age: 6–11") |> 
              count(participant_id) |> rename("number_height_measurements_school" = "n"),
            by = "participant_id") |> 
  mutate(height_measurement_school = case_when(number_height_measurements_school >= 1 ~ "yes",
                                        is.na(number_height_measurements_school) ~ "no")) |> 
  left_join(data_height_clean |>
              filter(age_group_height == "Adolescence: 12–17") |> 
              count(participant_id) |> rename("number_height_measurements_adolescence" = "n"),
            by = "participant_id") |> 
  mutate(height_measurement_adolescence = case_when(number_height_measurements_adolescence >= 1 ~ "yes",
                                        is.na(number_height_measurements_adolescence) ~ "no"))


data_height_clean <- data_height_clean |> 
  left_join(data_participant |> select(number_height_measurements_total, height_measurement_total, number_height_measurements_infancy, height_measurement_infancy, number_height_measurements_preschool, height_measurement_preschool, number_height_measurements_school, height_measurement_school, number_height_measurements_adolescence, height_measurement_adolescence, participant_id), by = "participant_id")

```


#### Number of weight measurements

```{r}

data_participant <- data_participant |> 
  left_join(data_weight_clean |>
              count(participant_id) |> rename("number_weight_measurements_total" = "n"),
            by = "participant_id") |> 
  mutate(weight_measurement_total = case_when(number_weight_measurements_total == 1 ~ "One",
                                           number_weight_measurements_total == 2 ~ "Two",
                                           number_weight_measurements_total >2 ~ "Three or more")) |> 
  left_join(data_weight_clean |>
              filter(age_group_weight == "Infancy: <1") |> 
              count(participant_id) |> rename("number_weight_measurements_infancy" = "n"),
            by = "participant_id") |> 
  mutate(weight_measurement_infancy = case_when(number_weight_measurements_infancy >= 1 ~ "yes",
                                        is.na(number_weight_measurements_infancy) ~ "no")) |> 
  left_join(data_weight_clean |>
              filter(age_group_weight == "Preschool age: 1–5") |> 
              count(participant_id) |> rename("number_weight_measurements_preschool" = "n"),
            by = "participant_id") |> 
  mutate(weight_measurement_preschool = case_when(number_weight_measurements_preschool >= 1 ~ "yes",
                                        is.na(number_weight_measurements_preschool) ~ "no")) |> 
  left_join(data_weight_clean |>
              filter(age_group_weight == "School age: 6–11") |> 
              count(participant_id) |> rename("number_weight_measurements_school" = "n"),
            by = "participant_id") |> 
  mutate(weight_measurement_school = case_when(number_weight_measurements_school >= 1 ~ "yes",
                                        is.na(number_weight_measurements_school) ~ "no")) |> 
  left_join(data_weight_clean |>
              filter(age_group_weight == "Adolescence: 12–17") |> 
              count(participant_id) |> rename("number_weight_measurements_adolescence" = "n"),
            by = "participant_id") |> 
  mutate(weight_measurement_adolescence = case_when(number_weight_measurements_adolescence >= 1 ~ "yes",
                                        is.na(number_weight_measurements_adolescence) ~ "no"))


data_weight_clean <- data_weight_clean |> 
  left_join(data_participant |> select(number_weight_measurements_total, weight_measurement_total, number_weight_measurements_infancy, weight_measurement_infancy, number_weight_measurements_preschool, weight_measurement_preschool, number_weight_measurements_school, weight_measurement_school, number_weight_measurements_adolescence, weight_measurement_adolescence, participant_id), by = "participant_id")

```


#### Number of HC measurements

```{r}

data_participant <- data_participant |> 
  left_join(data_head |>
              count(participant_id) |> rename("number_head_measurements_total" = "n"),
            by = "participant_id") |> 
  mutate(head_measurement_total = case_when(number_head_measurements_total == 1 ~ "One",
                                           number_head_measurements_total == 2 ~ "Two",
                                           number_head_measurements_total >2 ~ "Three or more")) |> 
  left_join(data_head |>
              filter(age_group_head == "Infancy: <1") |> 
              count(participant_id) |> rename("number_head_measurements_infancy" = "n"),
            by = "participant_id") |> 
  mutate(head_measurement_infancy = case_when(number_head_measurements_infancy >= 1 ~ "yes",
                                        is.na(number_head_measurements_infancy) ~ "no")) |> 
  left_join(data_head |>
              filter(age_group_head == "Preschool age: 1–5") |> 
              count(participant_id) |> rename("number_head_measurements_preschool" = "n"),
            by = "participant_id") |> 
  mutate(head_measurement_preschool = case_when(number_head_measurements_preschool >= 1 ~ "yes",
                                        is.na(number_head_measurements_preschool) ~ "no")) |> 
  left_join(data_head |>
              filter(age_group_head == "School age: 6–11") |> 
              count(participant_id) |> rename("number_head_measurements_school" = "n"),
            by = "participant_id") |> 
  mutate(head_measurement_school = case_when(number_head_measurements_school >= 1 ~ "yes",
                                        is.na(number_head_measurements_school) ~ "no")) |> 
  left_join(data_head |>
              filter(age_group_head == "Adolescence: 12–17") |> 
              count(participant_id) |> rename("number_head_measurements_adolescence" = "n"),
            by = "participant_id") |> 
  mutate(head_measurement_adolescence = case_when(number_head_measurements_adolescence >= 1 ~ "yes",
                                        is.na(number_head_measurements_adolescence) ~ "no"))


data_head <- data_head |> 
  left_join(data_participant |> select(number_head_measurements_total, head_measurement_total, number_head_measurements_infancy, head_measurement_infancy, number_head_measurements_preschool, head_measurement_preschool, number_head_measurements_school, head_measurement_school, number_head_measurements_adolescence, head_measurement_adolescence, participant_id), by = "participant_id")

```

#### Number of BMI measurements

```{r}

data_participant <- data_participant |>

              filter(age_group_bmi == "Preschool age: 2–5") |>

              filter(age_group_bmi == "School age: 6–11") |> 
              count(participant_id) |> rename("number_bmi_measurements_school" = "n"),
            by = "participant_id") |> 
  mutate(bmi_measurement_school = case_when(number_bmi_measurements_school >= 1 ~ "yes",
                                        is.na(number_bmi_measurements_school) ~ "no")) |> 
  left_join(data_bmi |>
              filter(age_group_bmi == "Adolescence: 12–17") |> 
              count(participant_id) |> rename("number_bmi_measurements_adolescence" = "n"),
            by = "participant_id") |> 
  mutate(bmi_measurement_adolescence = case_when(number_bmi_measurements_adolescence >= 1 ~ "yes",
                                        is.na(number_bmi_measurements_adolescence) ~ "no"))


data_bmi <- data_bmi |> 
  left_join(data_participant |> select(number_bmi_measurements_total, bmi_measurement_total, number_bmi_measurements_preschool, bmi_measurement_preschool, number_bmi_measurements_school, bmi_measurement_school, number_bmi_measurements_adolescence, bmi_measurement_adolescence, participant_id), by = "participant_id")

```


## Calculate z-scores

#### Check interpolated growth references

Height

```{r}
interpolated_braegger_height_length <- interpolated_braegger_height |> 
  bind_rows(braegger_length)

interpolated_prader_height_length <- interpolated_prader_height |> 
  bind_rows(interpolated_prader_length |> filter(age_days <= 1094) |> mutate(M = case_when(age_days > 730 ~ M - 0.7,
                                                                              age_days <= 730 ~ M)))

interpolated_sempe_height_length <- interpolated_sempe_height |> 
  bind_rows(interpolated_sempe_length |> filter(age_days <= 912) |> mutate(M = case_when(age_days > 730 ~ M - 0.7,
                                                                              age_days <= 730 ~ M)))

```

```{r}

interpolated_braegger_height_length |> 
  mutate(reference = "Braegger") |> 
  bind_rows(interpolated_eiholzer_height |> mutate(reference = "Eiholzer")) |> 
  bind_rows(interpolated_prader_height_length |> mutate(reference = "Prader")) |> 
  bind_rows(interpolated_sempe_height_length |> mutate(reference = "Sempé")) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = age_days, y = M, color = reference)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.2) +
  facet_wrap(~sex)

interpolated_braegger_height_length |> 
  mutate(reference = "Braegger") |> 
  bind_rows(interpolated_eiholzer_height |> mutate(reference = "Eiholzer")) |> 
  bind_rows(interpolated_prader_height_length |> mutate(reference = "Prader")) |> 
  bind_rows(interpolated_sempe_height_length |> mutate(reference = "Sempé")) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = age_days, y = S, color = reference)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.2) +
  facet_wrap(~sex)


interpolated_braegger_height_length |> 
  mutate(reference = "Braegger") |> 
  bind_rows(interpolated_eiholzer_height |> mutate(reference = "Eiholzer")) |> 
  bind_rows(interpolated_prader_height_length |> mutate(reference = "Prader")) |> 
  bind_rows(interpolated_sempe_height_length |> mutate(reference = "Sempé")) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = age_days, y = L, color = reference)) +
  geom_line() +
  facet_wrap(~sex)


```

I use tables of interpolated LMS-values to calculate z-scores of height, weight and BMI.

I define a function to calculate z-scores. I use the correction method of the WHO for z-scores <-3 and >+3, see [here](https://cdn.who.int/media/docs/default-source/child-growth/growth-reference-5-19-years/computation.pdf).

```{r}
#| output: false
#| warning: false

# function to calculate z-scores -----

z_score_calc = function(L,M,S,parameter){
  if(is.na(L)|is.na(M)|is.na(S)|is.na(parameter)){
    return(NA)
  }
  z_score = ((parameter/M)^L-1)/(S*L)
  return(z_score)
}

# function to calculate corrected z-scores as described by the WHO. -----

z_score_calc_corr = function(L,M,S,parameter){
  if(is.na(L)|is.na(M)|is.na(S)|is.na(parameter)){
    return(NA)
  }
  z_score = ((parameter/M)^L-1)/(S*L)
  if (z_score > 3){
    SD3pos = M*(1+S*L*3)^(1/L)
    SD2pos = M*(1+S*L*2)^(1/L)
    SD23pos = SD3pos - SD2pos
    z_score = 3+((parameter-SD3pos)/SD23pos)
    return(z_score)
  } else if (z_score < -3){
    SD3neg = M*(1+S*L*(-3))^(1/L)
    SD2neg = M*(1+S*L*(-2))^(1/L)
    SD23neg = SD2neg - SD3neg
    z_score = -3+((parameter-SD3neg)/SD23neg)
    return(z_score)
  } else{
    return(z_score)
  }
}
```


#### Braegger references

Height

```{r}
#| output: false
#| warning: false


# add L,M,S values of height reference to each individual
data_height_clean <- data_height_clean |> 
  mutate(age_days_z = round(age_days_height)) |> 
  left_join(y=interpolated_braegger_height_length, by = c('age_days_z' = "age_days",'sex'))


# calculate height z scores with correction
data_height_clean <- data_height_clean %>%
  rowwise() %>% 
  mutate(z_height_braegger=z_score_calc_corr(L,M,S,height_cm)) %>% 
  mutate(diff_height_braegger = height_cm - M) %>% 
  ungroup()

# delete LMS values
exclude_col = c("L","M","S")

data_height_clean <- data_height_clean %>% 
  dplyr::select(-exclude_col)

```

Weight

```{r}

#| warning: false

  mutate(age_days_z = round(age_days_weight)) |> 
  left_join(y=interpolated_braegger_weight, by = c('age_days_z' = "age_days",'sex'))


# calculate weight z scores with correction

  rowwise() %>% 
  mutate(z_weight_braegger=z_score_calc_corr(L,M,S,weight_kg)) %>% 
  mutate(diff_weight_braegger = weight_kg - M) %>% 
  ungroup()

# delete LMS values
exclude_col = c("L","M","S")

data_weight_clean <- data_weight_clean %>%
```

```{r}
  dplyr::select(-exclude_col)

```


## Calculate GA corrected z-scores

#### Braegger references

Height

```{r}
#| output: false
#| warning: false


# add L,M,S values of height reference to each individual
data_height_clean <- data_height_clean |> 
  mutate(age_days_GA_z = round(age_days_GA_height)) |> 
  left_join(y=interpolated_braegger_height_length, by = c('age_days_GA_z' = "age_days",'sex'))


# calculate height z scores with correction
data_height_clean <- data_height_clean %>%
  rowwise() %>% 
  mutate(z_height_GA_braegger=z_score_calc_corr(L,M,S,height_cm)) %>%
  ungroup()

# delete LMS values
exclude_col = c("L","M","S")

data_height_clean <- data_height_clean %>% 
  dplyr::select(-exclude_col)

```

Weight

```{r}

#| warning: false

  left_join(y=interpolated_braegger_weight, by = c('age_days_GA_z' = "age_days",'sex'))


# calculate weight z scores with correction
data_weight_clean <- data_weight_clean %>%
  rowwise() %>% 
  mutate(z_weight_GA_braegger=z_score_calc_corr(L,M,S,weight_kg)) %>% 
  ungroup()

# delete LMS values
exclude_col = c("L","M","S")

data_weight_clean <- data_weight_clean %>% 
  dplyr::select(-exclude_col)
```

### Obesity and Height categories

```{r}
#| output: false
#| warning: false


# Eiholzer, I calculate the exact cut-offs with the LMS-values provided in the publication
eiholzer_severe_obesity_cut_off_bmi_boys <- z_score_calc(-1.5861,21.970,0.1444,35)
eiholzer_obesity_cut_off_bmi_boys <- z_score_calc(-1.5861,21.970,0.1444,30)
eiholzer_overweight_cut_off_bmi_boys <- z_score_calc(-1.5861,21.970,0.1444,25)
eiholzer_Thinness_grade_I_cut_off_bmi_boys <- z_score_calc(-1.5861,21.970,0.1444,18.5)
eiholzer_Thinness_grade_II_cut_off_bmi_boys <- z_score_calc(-1.5861,21.970,0.1444,17)
eiholzer_Thinness_grade_III_cut_off_bmi_boys <- z_score_calc(-1.5861,21.970,0.1444,16)

eiholzer_severe_obesity_cut_off_bmi_girls <- z_score_calc(-1.7200,21.422,0.1347,35)
eiholzer_obesity_cut_off_bmi_girls <- z_score_calc(-1.7200,21.422,0.1347,30)
eiholzer_overweight_cut_off_bmi_girls <- z_score_calc(-1.7200,21.422,0.1347,25)
eiholzer_Thinness_grade_I_cut_off_bmi_girls <- z_score_calc(-1.7200,21.422,0.1347,18.5)
eiholzer_Thinness_grade_II_cut_off_bmi_girls <- z_score_calc(-1.7200,21.422,0.1347,17)
eiholzer_Thinness_grade_III_cut_off_bmi_girls <- z_score_calc(-1.7200,21.422,0.1347,16)


# IOTF, I calculate the exact cut-offs with the LMS-values provided in the publication
iotf_severe_obesity_cut_off_bmi_boys <- z_score_calc(-1.487,20.759,0.12395,35)
iotf_obesity_cut_off_bmi_boys <- z_score_calc(-1.487,20.759,0.12395,30)
iotf_overweight_cut_off_bmi_boys <- z_score_calc(-1.487,20.759,0.12395,25)
iotf_Thinness_grade_I_cut_off_bmi_boys <- z_score_calc(-1.487,20.759,0.12395,18.5)
iotf_Thinness_grade_II_cut_off_bmi_boys <- z_score_calc(-1.487,20.759,0.12395,17)
iotf_Thinness_grade_III_cut_off_bmi_boys <- z_score_calc(-1.487,20.759,0.12395,16)

iotf_severe_obesity_cut_off_bmi_girls <- z_score_calc(-1.423,20.792,0.13033,35)
iotf_obesity_cut_off_bmi_girls <- z_score_calc(-1.423,20.792,0.13033,30)
iotf_overweight_cut_off_bmi_girls <- z_score_calc(-1.423,20.792,0.13033,25)
iotf_Thinness_grade_I_cut_off_bmi_girls <- z_score_calc(-1.423,20.792,0.13033,18.5)
iotf_Thinness_grade_II_cut_off_bmi_girls <- z_score_calc(-1.423,20.792,0.13033,17)
iotf_Thinness_grade_III_cut_off_bmi_girls <- z_score_calc(-1.423,20.792,0.13033,16)

# Braegger, I use the cut-offs for overweight (90th perc.), obesity (97th perc.), and severe obestiy (99.5th perc.) mentioned in the publication.
# I will use the same cut-offs inverted for thinness I (10th perc.), thinness II (3rd perc.) , and thinness III (0.5th perc.)

braegger_severe_obesity_cut_off_bmi <- qnorm(0.995)
braegger_obesity_cut_off_bmi <- qnorm(0.97)
braegger_overweight_cut_off_bmi <- qnorm(0.90)
braegger_Thinness_grade_I_cut_off_bmi <- qnorm(0.1)
braegger_Thinness_grade_II_cut_off_bmi <- qnorm(0.03)
braegger_Thinness_grade_III_cut_off_bmi <- qnorm(0.005)

```

Now I can define the BMI category (overweight, obesity, and thinness) for every individual and the different growth references.
I use the mean z-score for individuals with multiple measurements.

```{r}
#| output: false
#| warning: false

data_participant <- data_participant |> 
  left_join(data_bmi |> group_by(participant_id) |> summarise(mean_z_bmi_braegger = mean(z_bmi_braegger, na.rm = TRUE),
                                                              mean_z_bmi_eiholzer = mean(z_bmi_eiholzer, na.rm = TRUE),
                                                              mean_z_bmi_iotf = mean(z_bmi_iotf, na.rm = TRUE)) |> 
              select(participant_id, mean_z_bmi_braegger, mean_z_bmi_eiholzer, mean_z_bmi_iotf), by = "participant_id")

data_participant |> filter(is.na(mean_z_bmi_braegger)==FALSE) |> nrow()

data_participant <- data_participant %>%
  mutate(bmi_cat_eiholzer = factor(case_when(sex == "Male" & mean_z_bmi_eiholzer >= eiholzer_severe_obesity_cut_off_bmi_boys ~ "Severe obesity",
                                      sex == "Male" & mean_z_bmi_eiholzer >= eiholzer_obesity_cut_off_bmi_boys ~ "Obesity",
                                      sex == "Male" & mean_z_bmi_eiholzer >= eiholzer_overweight_cut_off_bmi_boys ~ "Overweight",
                                      sex == "Male" & mean_z_bmi_eiholzer >= eiholzer_Thinness_grade_I_cut_off_bmi_boys ~ "Normal",
                                      sex == "Male" & mean_z_bmi_eiholzer >= eiholzer_Thinness_grade_II_cut_off_bmi_boys ~ "Thinness I",
                                      sex == "Male" & mean_z_bmi_eiholzer >= eiholzer_Thinness_grade_III_cut_off_bmi_boys ~ "Thinness II",
                                      sex == "Male" & mean_z_bmi_eiholzer < eiholzer_Thinness_grade_III_cut_off_bmi_boys ~ "Thinness III",
                                      sex == "Female" & mean_z_bmi_eiholzer >= eiholzer_severe_obesity_cut_off_bmi_girls ~ "Severe obesity",
                                      sex == "Female" & mean_z_bmi_eiholzer >= eiholzer_obesity_cut_off_bmi_girls ~ "Obesity",
                                      sex == "Female" & mean_z_bmi_eiholzer >= eiholzer_overweight_cut_off_bmi_girls ~ "Overweight",
                                      sex == "Female" & mean_z_bmi_eiholzer >= eiholzer_Thinness_grade_I_cut_off_bmi_girls ~ "Normal",
                                      sex == "Female" & mean_z_bmi_eiholzer >= eiholzer_Thinness_grade_II_cut_off_bmi_girls ~ "Thinness I",
                                      sex == "Female" & mean_z_bmi_eiholzer >= eiholzer_Thinness_grade_III_cut_off_bmi_girls ~ "Thinness II",
                                      sex == "Female" & mean_z_bmi_eiholzer < eiholzer_Thinness_grade_III_cut_off_bmi_girls ~ "Thinness III")),
         bmi_cat_iotf = factor(case_when(sex == "Male" & mean_z_bmi_iotf >= iotf_severe_obesity_cut_off_bmi_boys ~ "Severe obesity",
                                      sex == "Male" & mean_z_bmi_iotf >= iotf_obesity_cut_off_bmi_boys ~ "Obesity",
                                      sex == "Male" & mean_z_bmi_iotf >= iotf_overweight_cut_off_bmi_boys ~ "Overweight",
                                      sex == "Male" & mean_z_bmi_iotf >= iotf_Thinness_grade_I_cut_off_bmi_boys ~ "Normal",
                                      sex == "Male" & mean_z_bmi_iotf >= iotf_Thinness_grade_II_cut_off_bmi_boys ~ "Thinness I",
                                      sex == "Male" & mean_z_bmi_iotf >= iotf_Thinness_grade_III_cut_off_bmi_boys ~ "Thinness II",
                                      sex == "Male" & mean_z_bmi_iotf < iotf_Thinness_grade_III_cut_off_bmi_boys ~ "Thinness III",
                                      sex == "Female" & mean_z_bmi_iotf >= iotf_severe_obesity_cut_off_bmi_girls ~ "Severe obesity",
                                      sex == "Female" & mean_z_bmi_iotf >= iotf_obesity_cut_off_bmi_girls ~ "Obesity",
                                      sex == "Female" & mean_z_bmi_iotf >= iotf_overweight_cut_off_bmi_girls ~ "Overweight",
                                      sex == "Female" & mean_z_bmi_iotf >= iotf_Thinness_grade_I_cut_off_bmi_girls ~ "Normal",
                                      sex == "Female" & mean_z_bmi_iotf >= iotf_Thinness_grade_II_cut_off_bmi_girls ~ "Thinness I",
                                      sex == "Female" & mean_z_bmi_iotf >= iotf_Thinness_grade_III_cut_off_bmi_girls ~ "Thinness II",
                                      sex == "Female" & mean_z_bmi_iotf < iotf_Thinness_grade_III_cut_off_bmi_girls ~ "Thinness III")),
         bmi_cat_braegger = factor(case_when(mean_z_bmi_braegger > braegger_severe_obesity_cut_off_bmi ~ "Severe obesity",
                                      mean_z_bmi_braegger > braegger_obesity_cut_off_bmi ~ "Obesity",
                                      mean_z_bmi_braegger > braegger_overweight_cut_off_bmi ~ "Overweight",
                                      mean_z_bmi_braegger >= braegger_Thinness_grade_I_cut_off_bmi ~ "Normal",
                                      mean_z_bmi_braegger >= braegger_Thinness_grade_II_cut_off_bmi ~ "Thinness I",
                                      mean_z_bmi_braegger >= braegger_Thinness_grade_III_cut_off_bmi ~ "Thinness II",
                                      mean_z_bmi_braegger < braegger_Thinness_grade_III_cut_off_bmi ~ "Thinness III")))


data_bmi <- data_bmi |> 
  mutate(bmi_cat_eiholzer = factor(case_when(sex == "m" & z_bmi_eiholzer >= eiholzer_severe_obesity_cut_off_bmi_boys ~ "Severe obesity",
                                      sex == "m" & z_bmi_eiholzer >= eiholzer_obesity_cut_off_bmi_boys ~ "Obesity",
                                      sex == "m" & z_bmi_eiholzer >= eiholzer_overweight_cut_off_bmi_boys ~ "Overweight",
                                      sex == "m" & z_bmi_eiholzer >= eiholzer_Thinness_grade_I_cut_off_bmi_boys ~ "Normal",
                                      sex == "m" & z_bmi_eiholzer >= eiholzer_Thinness_grade_II_cut_off_bmi_boys ~ "Thinness I",
                                      sex == "m" & z_bmi_eiholzer >= eiholzer_Thinness_grade_III_cut_off_bmi_boys ~ "Thinness II",
                                      sex == "m" & z_bmi_eiholzer < eiholzer_Thinness_grade_III_cut_off_bmi_boys ~ "Thinness III",
                                      sex == "f" & z_bmi_eiholzer >= eiholzer_severe_obesity_cut_off_bmi_girls ~ "Severe obesity",
                                      sex == "f" & z_bmi_eiholzer >= eiholzer_obesity_cut_off_bmi_girls ~ "Obesity",
                                      sex == "f" & z_bmi_eiholzer >= eiholzer_overweight_cut_off_bmi_girls ~ "Overweight",
                                      sex == "f" & z_bmi_eiholzer >= eiholzer_Thinness_grade_I_cut_off_bmi_girls ~ "Normal",
                                      sex == "f" & z_bmi_eiholzer >= eiholzer_Thinness_grade_II_cut_off_bmi_girls ~ "Thinness I",
                                      sex == "f" & z_bmi_eiholzer >= eiholzer_Thinness_grade_III_cut_off_bmi_girls ~ "Thinness II",
                                      sex == "f" & z_bmi_eiholzer < eiholzer_Thinness_grade_III_cut_off_bmi_girls ~ "Thinness III")),
         bmi_cat_iotf = factor(case_when(sex == "m" & z_bmi_iotf >= iotf_severe_obesity_cut_off_bmi_boys ~ "Severe obesity",
                                      sex == "m" & z_bmi_iotf >= iotf_obesity_cut_off_bmi_boys ~ "Obesity",
                                      sex == "m" & z_bmi_iotf >= iotf_overweight_cut_off_bmi_boys ~ "Overweight",
                                      sex == "m" & z_bmi_iotf >= iotf_Thinness_grade_I_cut_off_bmi_boys ~ "Normal",
                                      sex == "m" & z_bmi_iotf >= iotf_Thinness_grade_II_cut_off_bmi_boys ~ "Thinness I",
                                      sex == "m" & z_bmi_iotf >= iotf_Thinness_grade_III_cut_off_bmi_boys ~ "Thinness II",
                                      sex == "m" & z_bmi_iotf < iotf_Thinness_grade_III_cut_off_bmi_boys ~ "Thinness III",
                                      sex == "f" & z_bmi_iotf >= iotf_severe_obesity_cut_off_bmi_girls ~ "Severe obesity",
                                      sex == "f" & z_bmi_iotf >= iotf_obesity_cut_off_bmi_girls ~ "Obesity",
                                      sex == "f" & z_bmi_iotf >= iotf_overweight_cut_off_bmi_girls ~ "Overweight",
                                      sex == "f" & z_bmi_iotf >= iotf_Thinness_grade_I_cut_off_bmi_girls ~ "Normal",
                                      sex == "f" & z_bmi_iotf >= iotf_Thinness_grade_II_cut_off_bmi_girls ~ "Thinness I",
                                      sex == "f" & z_bmi_iotf >= iotf_Thinness_grade_III_cut_off_bmi_girls ~ "Thinness II",
                                      sex == "f" & z_bmi_iotf < iotf_Thinness_grade_III_cut_off_bmi_girls ~ "Thinness III")),
         bmi_cat_braegger = factor(case_when(z_bmi_braegger > braegger_severe_obesity_cut_off_bmi ~ "Severe obesity",
                                      z_bmi_braegger > braegger_obesity_cut_off_bmi ~ "Obesity",
                                      z_bmi_braegger > braegger_overweight_cut_off_bmi ~ "Overweight",
                                      z_bmi_braegger >= braegger_Thinness_grade_I_cut_off_bmi ~ "Normal",
                                      z_bmi_braegger >= braegger_Thinness_grade_II_cut_off_bmi ~ "Thinness I",
                                      z_bmi_braegger >= braegger_Thinness_grade_III_cut_off_bmi ~ "Thinness II",
                                      z_bmi_braegger < braegger_Thinness_grade_III_cut_off_bmi ~ "Thinness III")))  


```

Reorder bmi categories from Thinness III to Severe obesity:

```{r}
#| output: false
#| warning: false

data_participant <- data_participant %>%
  mutate(bmi_cat_braegger = fct_relevel(bmi_cat_braegger, c("Thinness III",
                                        "Thinness II",
                                        "Thinness I",
                                        "Normal",
                                        "Overweight",
                                        "Obesity",
                                        "Severe obesity")),
         bmi_cat_eiholzer = fct_relevel(bmi_cat_eiholzer, c("Thinness III",
                                        "Thinness II",
                                        "Thinness I",
                                        "Normal",
                                        "Overweight",
                                        "Obesity",
                                        "Severe obesity")),
         bmi_cat_iotf = fct_relevel(bmi_cat_iotf,c("Thinness III",
                                        "Thinness II",
                                        "Thinness I",
                                        "Normal",
                                        "Overweight",
                                        "Obesity",
                                        "Severe obesity")))


data_bmi <- data_bmi |> 
  mutate(bmi_cat_braegger = fct_relevel(bmi_cat_braegger, c("Thinness III",
                                        "Thinness II",
                                        "Thinness I",
                                        "Normal",
                                        "Overweight",
                                        "Obesity",
                                        "Severe obesity")),
         bmi_cat_eiholzer = fct_relevel(bmi_cat_eiholzer, c("Thinness III",
                                        "Thinness II",
                                        "Thinness I",
                                        "Normal",
                                        "Overweight",
                                        "Obesity",
                                        "Severe obesity")),
         bmi_cat_iotf = fct_relevel(bmi_cat_iotf,c("Thinness III",
                                        "Thinness II",
                                        "Thinness I",
                                        "Normal",
                                        "Overweight",
                                        "Obesity",
                                        "Severe obesity")))  

```


I define BMI categories without any thinness category. All individuals below overweight are defined as Normal.

```{r}
#| output: false
#| warning: false

data_participant <- data_participant %>% 
  mutate(bmi_cat_braegger_without_thin = factor(case_when(bmi_cat_braegger == "Thinness I" | bmi_cat_braegger == "Thinness II" | bmi_cat_braegger == "Thinness III" ~  "Normal",
                                                   TRUE ~ bmi_cat_braegger)),
         bmi_cat_eiholzer_without_thin = factor(case_when(bmi_cat_eiholzer == "Thinness I" | bmi_cat_eiholzer == "Thinness II" | bmi_cat_eiholzer == "Thinness III" ~  "Normal",
                                                   TRUE ~ bmi_cat_eiholzer)),
         bmi_cat_iotf_without_thin = factor(case_when(bmi_cat_iotf == "Thinness I" | bmi_cat_iotf == "Thinness II" | bmi_cat_iotf == "Thinness III" ~  "Normal",
                                                   TRUE ~ bmi_cat_iotf)))

data_participant <- data_participant %>%
  mutate(bmi_cat_braegger_without_thin = fct_relevel(bmi_cat_braegger_without_thin, c("Severe obesity",
                                                                                      "Obesity",
                                                                                      "Overweight",
                                                                                      "Normal")),
           bmi_cat_eiholzer_without_thin = fct_relevel(bmi_cat_eiholzer_without_thin, c("Severe obesity",
                                                                                      "Obesity",
                                                                                      "Overweight",
                                                                                      "Normal")),
           bmi_cat_iotf_without_thin = fct_relevel(bmi_cat_iotf_without_thin, c("Severe obesity",
                                                                                      "Obesity",
                                                                                      "Overweight",
                                                                                      "Normal")))


data_bmi <- data_bmi %>% 
  mutate(bmi_cat_braegger_without_thin = factor(case_when(bmi_cat_braegger == "Thinness I" | bmi_cat_braegger == "Thinness II" | bmi_cat_braegger == "Thinness III" ~  "Normal",
                                                   TRUE ~ bmi_cat_braegger)),
         bmi_cat_eiholzer_without_thin = factor(case_when(bmi_cat_eiholzer == "Thinness I" | bmi_cat_eiholzer == "Thinness II" | bmi_cat_eiholzer == "Thinness III" ~  "Normal",
                                                   TRUE ~ bmi_cat_eiholzer)),
         bmi_cat_iotf_without_thin = factor(case_when(bmi_cat_iotf == "Thinness I" | bmi_cat_iotf == "Thinness II" | bmi_cat_iotf == "Thinness III" ~  "Normal",
                                                   TRUE ~ bmi_cat_iotf)))

data_bmi <- data_bmi %>%
  mutate(bmi_cat_braegger_without_thin = fct_relevel(bmi_cat_braegger_without_thin, c("Severe obesity",
                                                                                      "Obesity",
                                                                                      "Overweight",
                                                                                      "Normal")),
           bmi_cat_eiholzer_without_thin = fct_relevel(bmi_cat_eiholzer_without_thin, c("Severe obesity",
                                                                                      "Obesity",
                                                                                      "Overweight",
                                                                                      "Normal")),
           bmi_cat_iotf_without_thin = fct_relevel(bmi_cat_iotf_without_thin, c("Severe obesity",
                                                                                      "Obesity",
                                                                                      "Overweight",
                                                                                      "Normal")))


```


I define a BMI category variable with obesity and severe obesity combined.

```{r}
#| output: false
#| warning: false


data_participant <- data_participant %>% 
  mutate(bmi_cat_braegger_without_thin_less = factor(case_when(bmi_cat_braegger == "Thinness I" | bmi_cat_braegger == "Thinness II" | bmi_cat_braegger == "Thinness III" ~  "Normal",
                                                               bmi_cat_braegger == "Severe obesity" ~ "Obesity",
                                                   TRUE ~ bmi_cat_braegger)),
         bmi_cat_eiholzer_without_thin_less = factor(case_when(bmi_cat_eiholzer == "Thinness I" | bmi_cat_eiholzer == "Thinness II" | bmi_cat_eiholzer == "Thinness III" ~  "Normal",
                                                               bmi_cat_eiholzer == "Severe obesity" ~ "Obesity",
                                                   TRUE ~ bmi_cat_eiholzer)),
         bmi_cat_iotf_without_thin_less = factor(case_when(bmi_cat_iotf == "Thinness I" | bmi_cat_iotf == "Thinness II" | bmi_cat_iotf == "Thinness III" ~  "Normal",
                                                           bmi_cat_iotf == "Severe obesity" ~ "Obesity",
                                                   TRUE ~ bmi_cat_iotf)))

data_participant <- data_participant %>%
  mutate(bmi_cat_braegger_without_thin_less = fct_relevel(bmi_cat_braegger_without_thin_less, c("Obesity",
                                                                      "Overweight",
                                                                      "Normal")),
           bmi_cat_eiholzer_without_thin_less = fct_relevel(bmi_cat_eiholzer_without_thin_less, c("Obesity",
                                                                      "Overweight",
                                                                      "Normal")),
           bmi_cat_iotf_without_thin_less = fct_relevel(bmi_cat_iotf_without_thin_less, c("Obesity",
                                                                      "Overweight",
                                                                      "Normal")))


data_bmi <- data_bmi %>% 
  mutate(bmi_cat_braegger_without_thin_less = factor(case_when(bmi_cat_braegger == "Thinness I" | bmi_cat_braegger == "Thinness II" | bmi_cat_braegger == "Thinness III" ~  "Normal",
                                                               bmi_cat_braegger == "Severe obesity" ~ "Obesity",
                                                   TRUE ~ bmi_cat_braegger)),
         bmi_cat_eiholzer_without_thin_less = factor(case_when(bmi_cat_eiholzer == "Thinness I" | bmi_cat_eiholzer == "Thinness II" | bmi_cat_eiholzer == "Thinness III" ~  "Normal",
                                                               bmi_cat_eiholzer == "Severe obesity" ~ "Obesity",
                                                   TRUE ~ bmi_cat_eiholzer)),
         bmi_cat_iotf_without_thin_less = factor(case_when(bmi_cat_iotf == "Thinness I" | bmi_cat_iotf == "Thinness II" | bmi_cat_iotf == "Thinness III" ~  "Normal",
                                                           bmi_cat_iotf == "Severe obesity" ~ "Obesity",
                                                   TRUE ~ bmi_cat_iotf)))

data_bmi <- data_bmi %>%
  mutate(bmi_cat_braegger_without_thin_less = fct_relevel(bmi_cat_braegger_without_thin_less, c("Obesity",
                                                                      "Overweight",
                                                                      "Normal")),
           bmi_cat_eiholzer_without_thin_less = fct_relevel(bmi_cat_eiholzer_without_thin_less, c("Obesity",
                                                                      "Overweight",
                                                                      "Normal")),
           bmi_cat_iotf_without_thin_less = fct_relevel(bmi_cat_iotf_without_thin_less, c("Obesity",
                                                                      "Overweight",
                                                                      "Normal")))

```


I define a height category variable with the categories: Short stature, Normal, Tall stature.

```{r}
#| output: false
#| warning: false

LLN_height <- qnorm(0.03)
ULN_height <- qnorm(0.97)

data_participant <- data_participant |> 
  left_join(data_height_clean |> group_by(participant_id) |> summarise(mean_z_height_braegger = mean(z_height_braegger, na.rm = TRUE),
                                                              mean_z_height_eiholzer = mean(z_height_eiholzer, na.rm = TRUE),
                                                              mean_z_height_prader = mean(z_height_prader, na.rm = TRUE),
                                                              mean_z_height_sempe = mean(z_height_sempe, na.rm = TRUE)) |> 
              select(participant_id, mean_z_height_braegger, mean_z_height_eiholzer, mean_z_height_prader, mean_z_height_sempe), by = "participant_id")

data_participant <- data_participant %>%
  mutate(height_cat_eiholzer = factor(case_when(mean_z_height_eiholzer > ULN_height ~ "Tall stature",
                                         mean_z_height_eiholzer > LLN_height ~ "Normal",
                                         mean_z_height_eiholzer < LLN_height ~ "Short stature")),
         height_cat_braegger = factor(case_when(mean_z_height_braegger > ULN_height ~ "Tall stature",
                                         mean_z_height_braegger > LLN_height ~ "Normal",
                                         mean_z_height_braegger < LLN_height ~ "Short stature")),
         height_cat_prader = factor(case_when(mean_z_height_prader > ULN_height ~ "Tall stature",
                                         mean_z_height_prader > LLN_height ~ "Normal",
                                         mean_z_height_prader < LLN_height ~ "Short stature")),
         height_cat_sempe = factor(case_when(mean_z_height_sempe > ULN_height ~ "Tall stature",
                                         mean_z_height_sempe > LLN_height ~ "Normal",
                                         mean_z_height_sempe < LLN_height ~ "Short stature")))

data_participant <- data_participant %>%
  mutate(height_cat_eiholzer = fct_relevel(height_cat_eiholzer, c("Tall stature", "Normal", "Short stature")),
         height_cat_braegger = fct_relevel(height_cat_braegger, c("Tall stature", "Normal", "Short stature")),
         height_cat_prader = fct_relevel(height_cat_prader, c("Tall stature", "Normal", "Short stature")),
         height_cat_sempe = fct_relevel(height_cat_sempe, c("Tall stature", "Normal", "Short stature")))


data_height_clean <- data_height_clean %>%
  mutate(height_cat_eiholzer = factor(case_when(z_height_eiholzer > ULN_height ~ "Tall stature",
                                         z_height_eiholzer > LLN_height ~ "Normal",
                                         z_height_eiholzer < LLN_height ~ "Short stature")),
         height_cat_braegger = factor(case_when(z_height_braegger > ULN_height ~ "Tall stature",
                                         z_height_braegger > LLN_height ~ "Normal",
                                         z_height_braegger < LLN_height ~ "Short stature")),
         height_cat_prader = factor(case_when(z_height_prader > ULN_height ~ "Tall stature",
                                         z_height_prader > LLN_height ~ "Normal",
                                         z_height_prader < LLN_height ~ "Short stature")),
         height_cat_sempe = factor(case_when(z_height_sempe > ULN_height ~ "Tall stature",
                                         z_height_sempe > LLN_height ~ "Normal",
                                         z_height_sempe < LLN_height ~ "Short stature")))

data_height_clean <- data_height_clean %>%
  mutate(height_cat_eiholzer = fct_relevel(height_cat_eiholzer, c("Tall stature", "Normal", "Short stature")),
         height_cat_braegger = fct_relevel(height_cat_braegger, c("Tall stature", "Normal", "Short stature")),
         height_cat_prader = fct_relevel(height_cat_prader, c("Tall stature", "Normal", "Short stature")),
         height_cat_sempe = fct_relevel(height_cat_sempe, c("Tall stature", "Normal", "Short stature")))

```



# Descriptive

## Outcome

```{r}

data_height_clean |> ggplot(aes(x = age_years_height, y = height_cm))+
  geom_point(size = 0.2)

data_weight_clean |> ggplot(aes(x = age_years_weight, y = weight_kg))+
  geom_point(size = 0.2)

data_head |> ggplot(aes(x = age_years_circumference, y = head_cm))+
  geom_point(size = 0.2)

```

## Exposure

```{r}

data_participant |> select(swiss_sep_3) |> plot_histogram()

```


# Main analysis

## Analysis weights

Every participant should contribute the same amount to the analysis, whether they had 1 or 5 measurements.

```{r}

data_height_clean <- data_height_clean |>  
  mutate(analysis_weight = 1/number_height_measurements_total)

data_weight_clean <- data_weight_clean |> 
  mutate(analysis_weight = 1/number_weight_measurements_total)

data_head <- data_head |> 
  mutate(analysis_weight = 1/number_head_measurements_total)

data_bmi <- data_bmi |> 
  mutate(analysis_weight = 1/number_bmi_measurements_total)

```



### Table 1: Characteristics of SwissPedGrowth



```{r}


svydesign(id = ~participant_id, data = data_height_clean, weights = ~analysis_weight) |> 
  as_survey() |> 
  select(sex, height_measurement_infancy, height_measurement_preschool, height_measurement_school, height_measurement_adolescence, nationality_group_middle, swiss_sep_3, swiss_sep_3_quintile, hospital, number_height_measurements_total) |>
  tbl_svysummary(type = list(all_continuous() ~ "continuous2",
                             all_dichotomous() ~ "categorical"),
              statistic = list(all_continuous2() ~ c("{mean} ({sd})", "{median} ({p25}, {p75})", "{min}, {max}"),
                               all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p})"),
              missing = "ifany",
              missing_stat = "{N_miss} ({p_miss}%)",
              percent = "column",
              digits = list(all_categorical() ~ 0,
                            all_continuous() ~ 1))

```

```{r}




svydesign(id = ~participant_id, data = data_weight_clean, weights = ~analysis_weight) |> 
  as_survey() |> 
  select(sex, weight_measurement_infancy, weight_measurement_preschool, weight_measurement_school, weight_measurement_adolescence, nationality_group_middle, swiss_sep_3, swiss_sep_3_quintile, hospital, number_weight_measurements_total) |>
  tbl_svysummary(type = list(all_continuous() ~ "continuous2",
                             all_dichotomous() ~ "categorical"),
              statistic = list(all_continuous2() ~ c("{mean} ({sd})", "{median} ({p25}, {p75})", "{min}, {max}"),
                               all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p})"),
              missing = "ifany",
              missing_stat = "{N_miss} ({p_miss}%)",
              percent = "column",
              digits = list(all_categorical() ~ 0,
                            all_continuous() ~ 1))

```


```{r}



svydesign(id = ~participant_id, data = data_head, weights = ~analysis_weight) |> 
  as_survey() |> 
  select(sex, head_measurement_infancy, head_measurement_preschool, head_measurement_school, head_measurement_adolescence, nationality_group_middle, swiss_sep_3, swiss_sep_3_quintile, hospital, number_head_measurements_total) |>
  tbl_svysummary(type = list(all_continuous() ~ "continuous2",
                             all_dichotomous() ~ "categorical"),
              statistic = list(all_continuous2() ~ c("{mean} ({sd})", "{median} ({p25}, {p75})", "{min}, {max}"),
                               all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p})"),
              missing = "ifany",
              missing_stat = "{N_miss} ({p_miss}%)",
              percent = "column",
              digits = list(all_categorical() ~ 0,
                            all_continuous() ~ 1))

```


```{r}

svydesign(id = ~participant_id, data = data_bmi, weights = ~analysis_weight) |> 
  as_survey() |> 
  select(sex, bmi_measurement_preschool, bmi_measurement_school, bmi_measurement_adolescence, nationality_group_middle, swiss_sep_3, swiss_sep_3_quintile, hospital, number_bmi_measurements_total) |>
```
